name: Mid-Market Manufacturing Companies (DACH)
description: Manufacturing companies with 500-5,000 employees across Germany, Austria, and Switzerland undergoing digital transformation.

tam.description: Total cloud services spend by DACH manufacturing sector
tam.source: LLM estimate: ~4,000 mid-market manufacturers in DACH, growing cloud adoption at 25-30% of IT budget, avg IT spend ~3% of revenue

sam.description: Managed cloud and hybrid infrastructure for mid-market DACH manufacturers
sam.source: LLM estimate: ~2,000 companies in addressable size range, avg EUR 600K cloud infrastructure spend, filtered to managed/hybrid cloud services

som.description: 40 customers x EUR 600K avg ACV in 3 years
som.source: Bottom-up estimate: T-Systems can win ~40 mid-market accounts via Telekom channel and existing relationships at EUR 400K-800K ACV for hybrid cloud + migration + container services
